description: Checks daily for new releases from artists you follow on Spotify and messages you on Slack, Telegram, or both.

SLACK_USER.description: Your Slack user id — releases are DMed here. Leave empty to skip Slack delivery.

TELEGRAM_CHAT.description: Telegram chat id — releases are sent here. Leave empty to skip Telegram delivery. No chat picker exists yet; enter the numeric chat id.

SPOTIFY_TOKEN.description: Spotify OAuth token with the user-follow-read scope.
